case_title: ALIFEA DAVIS VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-05-2008 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-05-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, ALIFEA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DAVIS, ALIFEA AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2008 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-21-2008 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT DOES NOT ACCEPT THE PROOF OF SERVICE PRESENTED BY THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF TO HAVE CLERK'S OFFICE SEND CERTIFIED MAIL. JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, ALIFEA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC. $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,700.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
